title: [LLHD] Add support for IntegerType to SROA

features.name: packed array signal declaration
features.description: Code should include a packed multi-dimensional array signal declaration where all dimensions are packed (bit-contiguous), creating an IntegerType representation when lowered through circt-verilog into LLHD

features.name: bit-select on packed array signal
features.description: Code should include a static bit-select (single-bit or part-select) on a packed array signal, exercising partial use of the signal and triggering SROA's SigExtractOp path for IntegerType

features.name: multi-bit static part-select on packed signal
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit static part-select on a packed integer signal, where the slice width is greater than one bit, requiring bit-blasting through SROA's IntegerType destructuring pass

features.name: packed array with probe and drive operations
features.description: Code should include a packed array signal that is both read (probed) and written (driven) without any partial access, so that SROA should NOT destructure it — only signals with partial users warrant bit-blasting
